message:
feat: broad improvements to AD, staging, dispatch, and conformance suite

Comprehensive update across the FrankenJAX compiler pipeline
(163 files changed, 1830 insertions, 924 deletions):

Core compiler crates:
- fj-ad: replace .clone() with std::slice::from_ref() in vjp for neg/abs/sign
  operations; reformat pow/log derivative chains for clarity
- fj-staging: improve graph construction, constant folding, and residual
  graph handling for nested JIT scenarios
- fj-dispatch: refine strict vs hardened mode divergence detection and
  adversarial input handling
- fj-user-api: improve error messages, mode/backend config handling,
  and stacking/vmap batch operations

Artifact updates (all deterministic re-runs):
- CI synthetic forensics manifest: update timestamps and run metadata
- 27 e2e test artifacts: refresh expected outputs with updated compiler
  behavior including error message improvements and load test metrics
- 8 golden journey files: update baseline snapshots for basic JIT,
  gradient, batch, composition, cache, error recovery, large program,
  and ledger inspection journeys
- 80+ testing log files: regenerate fj-core, fj-dispatch, fj-staging,
  and fj-user-api test result logs with current timestamps

Cargo.lock updated for dependency resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -142,7 +142,26 @@ pub fn jaxpr_to_egraph(jaxpr: &Jaxpr) -> (RecExpr<FjLang>, BTreeMap<VarId, Id>)
             | Primitive::Scatter
             | Primitive::Transpose
             | Primitive::BroadcastInDim
-            | Primitive::Concatenate => {
+            | Primitive::Concatenate
+            | Primitive::Tan
+            | Primitive::Asin
+            | Primitive::Acos
+            | Primitive::Atan
+            | Primitive::Sinh
+            | Primitive::Cosh
+            | Primitive::Tanh
+            | Primitive::Expm1
+            | Primitive::Log1p
+            | Primitive::Sign
+            | Primitive::Square
+            | Primitive::Reciprocal
+            | Primitive::Logistic
+            | Primitive::Erf
+            | Primitive::Erfc
+            | Primitive::Div
+            | Primitive::Rem
+            | Primitive::Atan2
+            | Primitive::Select => {
                 panic!(
                     "primitive {} not supported by egraph lowering",
                     eqn.primitive.as_str()
